$schema_doc: Single source of truth for every tour. PHP (validator, linter, impact-check) and JS (tour engine) both read this file. Adding a new tour = adding an entry here + a steps file under public_html/assets/js/tours/tours/.

member-update-contact.name: How to update your phone or email
member-update-contact.blurb: Show me how to change my phone number or email address.
